decisions.title: Gate 11 closed on main with release tag
decisions.description: Updated PRD checklist item 11 to Done, committed on main, created annotated tag v0.1.0-stable and pushed both main and tag to origin.
alternatives: Create lightweight tag without doc sync (rejected to keep PRD checklist factual).

decisions.title: Validation of release tag publication
decisions.description: docs-check passed after PRD Gate 11 update; local and remote refs confirmed for tag v0.1.0-stable.
alternatives: Skip docs-check and trust local edit (rejected).
